item.title: GSM Mobile Phones Text Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: GSM Mobile Phones Text Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: onlinesmsmessaging
item.itunes:summary:
GSM Mobile Phones Text Messaging
(Chat & Messenging)
GSM Mobile Phones Text Messaging application is useful for different organization for forwarding news, job alert, wishing, invitation, notification, business information, product detail, greeting, events and other via text message from PC to globally mobile number. PC to mobile messaging software is designed for GSM mobile phones that connected with PC for transmit mass text message to your friends, relatives and other person cell phone number.

[read more]

PC to mobile messaging software is designed for GSM mobile phones that connected with PC for transmit mass text message to your friends, relatives and other person cell phone number.

item.content:encoded:
GSM Mobile Phones Text Messaging
(Chat & Messenging)
GSM Mobile Phones Text Messaging application is useful for different organization for forwarding news, job alert, wishing, invitation, notification, business information, product detail, greeting, events and other via text message from PC to globally mobile number. PC to mobile messaging software is designed for GSM mobile phones that connected with PC for transmit mass text message to your friends, relatives and other person cell phone number.

item.title: Publii Open-Source Static CMS [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Publii Open-Source Static CMS [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: bobmitro
item.itunes:summary:
Publii Open-Source Static CMS
(Internet Apps)
Publii is a desktop-based CMS for Linux, Windows, and Mac that makes creating static websites fast and hassle-free, for beginners and developers.
Unlike static-site generators that are often unwieldy and difficult to use, Publii provides an easy-to-understand UI much like server-based CMSs such as WordPress, where users can create posts and other site content, and style their site using a variety of built-in themes and options. Users can enjoy the benefits of a super-fast and secure static website, with all the convenience that a CMS provides.
What makes Publii even more unique is that the app runs locally on your desktop rather than on the site's server. Once the app has been installed you can create a site in minutes, even without internet access; since Publii is a desktop app you can create, update and modify your site offline, then upload the site changes to your server at the click of a button.

Publii supports multiple upload options, including standard HTTP/HTTPS servers, Netlify, Amazon S3, GitHub Pages, GitLab Pages and Google Cloud or SFTP.
[read more]
item.description:
Publii Open-Source Static CMS
(Internet Apps)
Publii is a desktop-based CMS for Linux, Windows, and Mac that makes creating static websites fast and hassle-free, for beginners and developers.
Unlike static-site generators that are often unwieldy and difficult to use, Publii provides an easy-to-understand UI much like server-based CMSs such as WordPress, where users can create posts and other site content, and style their site using a variety of built-in themes and options. Users can enjoy the benefits of a super-fast and secure static website, with all the convenience that a CMS provides.
What makes Publii even more unique is that the app runs locally on your desktop rather than on the site's server. Once the app has been installed you can create a site in minutes, even without internet access; since Publii is a desktop app you can create, update and modify your site offline, then upload the site changes to your server at the click of a button.

Publii supports multiple upload options, including standard HTTP/HTTPS servers, Netlify, Amazon S3, GitHub Pages, GitLab Pages and Google Cloud or SFTP.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Publii Open-Source Static CMS
(Internet Apps)
Publii is a desktop-based CMS for Linux, Windows, and Mac that makes creating static websites fast and hassle-free, for beginners and developers.
Unlike static-site generators that are often unwieldy and difficult to use, Publii provides an easy-to-understand UI much like server-based CMSs such as WordPress, where users can create posts and other site content, and style their site using a variety of built-in themes and options. Users can enjoy the benefits of a super-fast and secure static website, with all the convenience that a CMS provides.
What makes Publii even more unique is that the app runs locally on your desktop rather than on the site's server. Once the app has been installed you can create a site in minutes, even without internet access; since Publii is a desktop app you can create, update and modify your site offline, then upload the site changes to your server at the click of a button.

Publii supports multiple upload options, including standard HTTP/HTTPS servers, Netlify, Amazon S3, GitHub Pages, GitLab Pages and Google Cloud or SFTP.
[read more]

item.title: Qtractor [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Qtractor [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]
item.description:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]

item.itunes:author: onlinesmsmessaging
item.itunes:summary:
Online Mac Bulk SMS
(Chat & Messenging)
If you are thinking of sending bulk of messages to stay connected with your worldwide customers and clients then use Online Mac Bulk SMS Software which is capable to compose and send unlimited messages from Mac PC to multiple mobile phone users by skipping duplicate contacts from list.

item.title: Contact for Online Text Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Contact for Online Text Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: onlinesmsmessaging
item.itunes:summary:
Contact for Online Text Messaging
(Chat & Messenging)
Download Contact for Online Text Messaging utility from www.onlinesmstextmessaging.com website to deliver unlimited text message to national or international cell phone network. Bulk sms gateway application facilitates to control the load of sending instant message in any time around the world without any internet gateway. Text messaging software that allows you to sends new schemes in different languages.

[read more]

item.title: TrustVare PST to Office 365 Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: TrustVare PST to Office 365 Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: trustvare
item.itunes:summary:
TrustVare PST to Office 365 Converter
(Utilities)
For importing Outlook PST file e-mails, contacts, and calendars along with attachments into Office 365 mailbox, TrustVare PST to Office 365 Converter tool is a quite useful tool. Using this one-click PST to Office 365 migration application, you might also transfer particular folders or objects. To learn further, go to the official website and obtain a free trial. Manual Outlook PST importing to Office 365 takes a lot of time and effort. To ease this chore, TrustVare has developed the PST to Office 365 migration tool. TrustVare PST is therefore the best option if you intend to migrate your Outlook e-mails, contacts, and calendars to Office 365 mailbox. Outlook PST file data is uploaded by the application to a cloud-based Office 365 account in extremely quick time. Before sending PST file data into Office 365 account, the PST to Office 365 importer imports PST file data and preview all items. The software will handle everything; you must search a PST file and provide your Office 365 account login details. The software will offer 100% correct results and many more conveniences.
Essential Characteristics

Directly import Outlook mail into PST.

Backward Support for Multiple Languages

Easily navigable interface

Batch migration Outlook PST to Office 365

Organise Folders Hierarchy

100% Safe and Secure Instrument

supports every Windows operating system variant.

Attend to both ANSI and Unicode PST files.
[read more]
item.description:
TrustVare PST to Office 365 Converter
(Utilities)
For importing Outlook PST file e-mails, contacts, and calendars along with attachments into Office 365 mailbox, TrustVare PST to Office 365 Converter tool is a quite useful tool. Using this one-click PST to Office 365 migration application, you might also transfer particular folders or objects. To learn further, go to the official website and obtain a free trial. Manual Outlook PST importing to Office 365 takes a lot of time and effort. To ease this chore, TrustVare has developed the PST to Office 365 migration tool. TrustVare PST is therefore the best option if you intend to migrate your Outlook e-mails, contacts, and calendars to Office 365 mailbox. Outlook PST file data is uploaded by the application to a cloud-based Office 365 account in extremely quick time. Before sending PST file data into Office 365 account, the PST to Office 365 importer imports PST file data and preview all items. The software will handle everything; you must search a PST file and provide your Office 365 account login details. The software will offer 100% correct results and many more conveniences.
Essential Characteristics

Directly import Outlook mail into PST.

Backward Support for Multiple Languages

Easily navigable interface

Batch migration Outlook PST to Office 365

Organise Folders Hierarchy

100% Safe and Secure Instrument

supports every Windows operating system variant.

Attend to both ANSI and Unicode PST files.
[read more]

Manual Outlook PST importing to Office 365 takes a lot of time and effort. To ease this chore, TrustVare has developed the PST to Office 365 migration tool. TrustVare PST is therefore the best option if you intend to migrate your Outlook e-mails, contacts, and calendars to Office 365 mailbox. Outlook PST file data is uploaded by the application to a cloud-based Office 365 account in extremely quick time. Before sending PST file data into Office 365 account, the PST to Office 365 importer imports PST file data and preview all items. The software will handle everything; you must search a PST file and provide your Office 365 account login details. The software will offer 100% correct results and many more conveniences.
Essential Characteristics

Easily navigable interface

Batch migration Outlook PST to Office 365

Organise Folders Hierarchy

100% Safe and Secure Instrument

supports every Windows operating system variant.

Attend to both ANSI and Unicode PST files.
